items.title: Super money grabbing niche game
items.summary: This is one of the hardest game there is.  Good graphic, very nice mechanic, full use of brain cells every battle, one of the best story and thanks god for Thais. But if u don’t pay you can barely pass the content. Characters need dubes to use full mechanic. Some stage need certain mechanics to pass. Wheel card also needs dubes. Gacha rate is weird because there is guarantee pull but its random guarantee so you wont get what you pull for anyway in that banner. Very stupid for this part. Why guarantee then. New player need to pay alot to be able to do events. Lastly. Game translation is horrid.
items.author: Guddygigi
